notes.title: Live Meeting - 2026-04-11 16:41
notes.summary: The meeting introduced Nico, a new frontend engineer on the package team, and discussed various topics including issueherder for async issue weight, T-shirt sizing on issues, and daylight savings. The team also talked about iterating on their infrared dev escalation process and community contribution for Composer. Additionally, they discussed back-end weekly calls and front-end themed calls for social interaction. The meeting concluded with a mention of potential hiring increases in Q4.
key_decisions: Agreed to do T-shirt sizing on all issues
Decided to iterate on infrared dev escalation process

action_items.task: Discuss and decide on iterating on infrared dev escalation process
